Class Room

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.Room
public class Room extends Object
Represents a Room in the SmartHome system.

    Exposes the JavaFX device-count property.

    Returns the number of devices assigned to the room.

  • Constructor Details

    • Room

      public Room(String roomId, String name, int deviceCount)
      Creates a room entry.
      Parameters:
      roomId - unique room identifier
      name - display name of the room
      deviceCount - initial device count

  • Method Details

      public String getId()
      Returns the room identifier.
      Returns:
      room identifier

      public void setId(String roomId)

    • getDeviceCount

      public int getDeviceCount()
      Returns the number of devices assigned to the room.

      device count

    • setDeviceCount

      public void setDeviceCount(int count)
      Updates the stored device count.
      Parameters:
      count - new device count

      public javafx.beans.property.SimpleIntegerProperty deviceCountProperty()
      Exposes the JavaFX device-count property.

    • getDevices

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<Device> getDevices()
      Returns the devices assigned to the room.
      Returns:
      observable device list

    • addDevice

      public void addDevice(Device device)
      Adds a device to the room and refreshes the count.
      Parameters:
      device - device to add

    • removeDevice

      public void removeDevice(Device device)
      Removes a device from the room and refreshes the count.
      Parameters:
      device - device to remove
